## Checklist

### Recipe Quality
- [ ] The prompt is specific, detailed, and produces useful output on first use
- [ ] The "When to Use" section clearly describes the target scenario
- [ ] The example shows realistic input and output (not a trivial demo)
- [ ] Customization tips help users adapt the recipe to their context

### Format
- [ ] Follows the standard recipe template (Title, When to Use, Prompt, Example, Customization Tips, Tags)
- [ ] File is placed in the correct `recipes/` subdirectory
- [ ] File uses kebab-case naming (e.g., `generate-unit-tests.md`)

### Testing
- [ ] Tested with at least one AI coding agent (specify which one below)
- [ ] The prompt produces correct output without needing follow-up questions
- [ ] Tested on a real-world codebase, not just a toy example

### Agent(s) Tested With

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] GitHub Copilot
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Aider
- [ ] Cody (Sourcegraph)
- [ ] Other: ___
